description_long: This object is a modern desktop microphone, featuring a cylindrical black body with a rounded metallic mesh grille at the top for sound capture. The front face displays two prominent circular buttons and a small LED indicator, likely for power and mute functions. The microphone is mounted on a robust, U-shaped metallic stand with a circular base, providing stability and a professional appearance. A USB cable is attached at the rear, coiling around the base, indicating its digital connectivity. The sides of the microphone have additional rotary knobs, likely for gain and volume adjustment. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for podcasting, streaming, or professional audio recording in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black and silver desktop microphone with a mesh grille, control buttons, rotary knobs, and a sturdy circular base. It features a coiled USB cable for digital connectivity and a professional, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh grille, two circular buttons, LED indicator, and the central mounting on the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical body, rotary knobs, and the curved arms of the metallic stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the USB cable connection, two rear buttons, and the back of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the stand, rotary knobs, and the cable coiled around the base.
